name: Kaito Kiyomizu
bio: Believes that the truth lies in the shadows and seeks to uncover the hidden secrets of New Genesis 300. Seeks to rewrite the narrative.

name: Lila Lotusblume
bio: Thinks that the lost legends hold the key to understanding the present. Seeks to revive the spirit of New Genesis 300.

name: Renn Arashi
bio: Believes that the only way to move forward is to confront the darkness of the past. Seeks to shatter the illusions.
